arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford returns to Man Utd squad for Newcastle clash as star is handed Old Trafford lifeline
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford is set for a return to the Manchester United squad having arrived at Old Trafford in his tracksuit hours before the clash with Newcastle United

arts.ttl: Confirmed Manchester United squad members vs Newcastle as youngster included and shock call made
arts.sum: Man United's players started to arrive at Old Trafford at 4pm ahead of Monday night's Premier League clash with Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: Three Man United stars drop team news hints vs Newcastle amid Bruno Fernandes replacement call
arts.sum: Kick-off against Newcastle United is fast-approaching as Ruben Amorim prepares to name his matchday squad at Old Trafford - minus the suspended Bruno Fernandes.

arts.ttl: BREAKING Shock Marcus Rashford decision made ahead of Manchester United vs Newcastle
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford looks set to be included in the matchday squad for Man United's Premier League clash with Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Newcastle LIVE - early team news, how to watch and kick-off time
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Samuel Luckhurst, Tyrone Marshall, George Smith)
arts.sum: Live updates from Old Trafford as Man United take on Newcastle United in their final game of 2024.

arts.ttl: Carabao Cup: EFL confirm major VAR change for Arsenal-Newcastle and Liverpool-Tottenham semi-finals
arts.sum: VAR has not been in use during the tournament so far

arts.ttl: Mason Mount 'given green light to build golf simulator' at £4m Cheshire mansion - despite the injured Man United star living NEXT DOOR to a luxury course
arts.sum: Mason Mount initially faced having his proposal rejected by council planners, because it threatened five nearby trees protected by a Tree Preservation Order (TPO).

arts.ttl: Newcastle United 2025 stadium breakthrough, farewell to old favourites and boardroom appointments
arts.sum: That can only get better going into 2025 for Newcastle and with the accounts for the past 12 months to come, Silverstone and his commercial team will be looking to beat last year's revenue profit of £250m. With new stadium proposals, a new CEO, positive revenue figures and plenty of transfer business in and out to come in the next 12 months, once again it's all happening on Tyneside.

arts.ttl: Manchester United face immediate Marcus Rashford transfer problem as left-back enquiry made
arts.sum: The latest Manchester United transfer news and rumours as the January transfer window is just days away from officially opening.

arts.ttl: Ex-Newcastle footballer Michael Newberry dies suddenly aged just 27 as club pay tribute
arts.sum: Michael Newberry's club Cliftonville confirmed the shock news by saying they were "devastated" by his sudden passing as they extended their condolences to the player's family
